chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D- 2903 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 10235/2023. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on MA 9456/2023. 4. For hearing of main case. 06.06.2024. Petitioner Syed Khalid Hassan present in person. Mr. Rajesh Kumar Khagaija, Advocate for respondent No.3. Mr. Ishrat Ali Lohar, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G, Sindh. = 1. This is an application filed by petitioner for discharge of Vakalatnama filed by Mr. Noor-ul-Haq Qureshi, Advocate on his behalf on the ground that he would proceed with instant petition in person. There is no impediment in law to proceed with the matter in person. Accordingly, this application is allowed and the power of Mr. Noor-ul-Haq Qureshi is hereby discharged. 2to4. Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks directions to respondents No.1 to 3 to conduct impartial inquiry against the respondent No.4 and to recover the amount from her since her appointment till today. The petitioner also seeks direction to respondents No.1 to 3 to immediately dismiss the respondent No.4 from service. It is the case of petitioner that respondent No.4 was appointed as Medical Officer on contract basis having the age of 45 years without any advertisement or publication in any newspaper and she is presently holding the post of Director (HR) Sindh Technical Education & Vocational Training Authority (STEVTA) Government of Sindh at Karachi and since her notification of appointment was made without following the procedure of appointment through publication, her appointment being a case of favoritism and nepotism is liable to be cancelled.

The petitioner also seeks direction to respondents No.1 to 3 to immediately dismiss the respondent No.4 from service. It is the case of petitioner that respondent No.4 was appointed as Medical Officer on contract basis having the age of 45 years without any advertisement or publication in any newspaper and she is presently holding the post of Director (HR) Sindh Technical Education & Vocational Training Authority (STEVTA) Government of Sindh at Karachi and since her notification of appointment was made without following the procedure of appointment through publication, her appointment being a case of favoritism and nepotism is liable to be cancelled. It is an admitted position that the respondent No.4 was appointed in the year 2014 and the instant petition was preferred by petitioner in the month of August, 2022 after 06 years of the alleged appointment, which badly suffers from latches. Hence, this petition is dismissed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE
